entry.title: New: CR 24-86 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending the following: 1. FIRST READING of Bill 27, CD2 (2024), to grant a Change in Zoning from Agricultural and Interim Districts to M-1 Light Industrial and M-2 Heavy Industrial Districts, respectively (Conditional Zoning), for a 200-acre portion of a 16,337.6-acre parcel, identified for real property tax purposes as tax map key (2) 4-9-002:061, Lānaʻi City, Lānaʻi, Hawaiʻi, to allow for the development of Miki 200 Industrial Park; and 2. RECORDATION of the Unilateral Agreement.

Housing and Land Use Committee (2023-2025)

View on the council site
